## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint:all` passes (markdown + ESLint)
- [ ] JSON files are valid (marketplace.json, plugin.json)
- [ ] Plugin entry added/updated in `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` (if adding a plugin)
- [ ] Root README updated (if adding a plugin)
- [ ] SKILL.md has YAML frontmatter with `name` and `description` (if adding a skill)
- [ ] Bash scripts have usage comments and `set -euo pipefail` (if adding scripts)
